hero.label: PT Global Dataverse Indonesia
hero.sub: We work with businesses who are ready to level up, whether that's modernizing the way things run or building software tailored to exactly what you need. No fluff, just solid work and people you can rely on.

manifesto.text: GDI IS NOT A TRADITIONAL IT CONSULTANCY — WE ARE BUILDERS — SYSTEMS. EXECUTION. — AI-FIRST. LONG-TERM. INDONESIA. —

dual_engine.label: WHAT WE DO
dual_engine.intro: End-to-end digitalization for organizations. We handle the full build from requirements to deployment and long-term support.
dual_engine.engine1_desc: End-to-end system development and implementation for organizations. ERP systems, AI integration, custom software, and digital infrastructure — delivered as a professional consulting engagement.

quote.text: Technology should be used to empower human potential, not replace it.

cta.heading: Have something you want to build?
cta.sub: Building something? Fixing something? Either way, we're the right people to talk to.
cta.org_desc: Looking to modernize systems or integrate AI
cta.founder_desc: Looking for a long-term technical partner

footer.copyright: PT Global Dataverse Indonesia. All rights reserved.

about.hero_headline: A company built around execution and long-term work.
about.hero_sub: GDI works with organizations that need to modernize their operations, and with founders who need a reliable long-term technical partner. In both cases, we take the work seriously and stay for the long term.
about.position_quote: An AI-first systems integrator — operating on the Frappe and ERPNext ecosystem and beyond.
about.position_body: We work with organizations that need modern digital infrastructure. Our team has worked across industries including trade, logistics, manufacturing, and services.
about.flywheel_sub: From initial requirements to long-term support, we take full ownership of the technical journey.
about.flywheel_step1_desc: We start by deeply understanding your operations and design systems that solve real problems — not generic templates applied at scale.
about.flywheel_step2_desc: Full technical execution from architecture to deployment. We own the build completely and deliver systems that work in practice.
about.flywheel_step3_desc: After deployment, we stay. Systems need to evolve as your business grows, and we're built for that long-term partnership.
about.p1_body: We're not the type to ship and ghost. If we're building something with you, we actually care whether it works in the real world, not just whether it passes a test.
about.p2_body: Everything GDI does connects to a bigger picture. Long-term client relationships sharpen our technical skills and deepen our domain knowledge. One engagement makes the next one better.
about.p3_body: GDI is rooted in Bandung and proudly focused on Indonesia, but we're open to working with anyone, anywhere. We believe building strong companies here is both a smart move and something that truly matters.
about.ventures_sub: Only ideas with strong conviction across all three dimensions get pursued under the venture-building model.
about.v1_body: Is there a real, significant problem being solved? Is it urgent, recurring, and wide enough in scope to build a defensible business around?
about.v2_body: Is the opportunity well-defined? Is there a reachable customer segment, a clear value exchange, and meaningful room for growth?
about.v3_body: Does the founder bring deep domain knowledge, real commitment, and the discipline to see the venture through its early stages?

services.hero_sub: We're not a one-project shop. GDI teams up with organizations and founders who need real technical muscle, the kind that sticks around, knows your system inside out, and actually gives a damn about what you're building. Starting fresh or cleaning up years of tech debt? We've got you.
services.orgs_intro: End-to-end digital transformation for organizations across Indonesia.
services.o1_desc: Enterprise resource planning systems built on the Frappe ecosystem — customized to your specific operational workflows.
services.o2_desc: Deployment of AI agents and automation layers into your existing systems, including the GDI AI Agent.
services.o3_desc: Bespoke platforms and applications built to solve specific operational problems — not generic off-the-shelf solutions.
services.o4_desc: Architecture design and deployment of the digital infrastructure your organization needs to operate at scale.
services.o5_desc: System audits, technical strategy, and consulting engagements that surface where technology can create real value.
services.o6_desc: Long-term technical partnership — we stay after the build to ensure the system continues to work in practice.
services.founders_intro: For founders who need a dedicated, reliable technical team to build and grow their product — without the overhead of building one in-house.
services.f1_desc: GDI becomes your technical team. We handle development end-to-end so you can stay focused on building your business.
services.f2_desc: End-to-end product development from architecture to launch — we own the technical execution entirely.
services.f3_desc: CTO-level guidance and technical direction. We help you make the right architectural decisions from the start.
services.f4_desc: From concept to launch, we handle the full technical build. No hand-offs, no gaps, no surprises.
services.f5_desc: We stay with you through the early stages and beyond — the phase where technical decisions have the longest consequences.
services.f6_desc: Founders who partner with GDI gain access to our technical infrastructure, tooling, and accumulated domain knowledge.
services.criteria_sub: We work with founders who are committed for the long term and have the domain knowledge to back their vision.
services.c1_desc: A real, significant problem with clear market potential and a product vision to match.
services.c2_desc: You understand your space deeply. We bring the technical execution, you bring the domain.
services.c3_desc: Building the right product takes time. We work with founders who are in it for the long haul.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.headline: Let's build.
contact.sub: You don't need to have it all figured out before reaching out. Some of our favorite projects started with 'I have this idea, but I'm not sure...' So yeah, slide into our inbox. Let's just talk!
contact.form_message: Tell us about what you're building or what you need
